reviews.title: A classic style getting destroyed by design team !
reviews.reviewText:
I had been buying the Sculpt Tank top for last one decade . Honestly, I love the style as its light weight; sleeveless and can be worn  easily in the Texas weather for running , gym , dance . I have slight tummy and this is the only tank which is not clingy like a teen tank. 

But last five years the design team has been continuously making changes to the classic tank ( do not understand why ) . First in 2019; they changed the fabric. Suddenly the fabric got very thin . I had to stop buying the white color as it was transparent . Next they added two pleat details at the back panel making it drape at the back. Now in 2026, they have again taken out the two pleats and got back to the original design. But this time still the fabric remains very thin. I have 5-6 versions of this tank over the years and still believe the original one back in 2015 was the best quality in terms of fit, fabric . Design team.. if u guys are reading my comments... please bring back the old fabric and stop playing with the design. Rather add more basic and pastel colours
